calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Continued To Feb-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Karen K Mcay, Esq. for Plaintiff: Capital Resource Partners, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Philippine Information Education and Resource Center, Inc., and Luz Deleon as follows:
Damages of $65,234.11
Judgment is for a total of $70,584.30
Counsel to prepare a proposed Judgment with amount of Attorney's Fees and Costs, and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.

12-6-04
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Damages $65,234.11, Attorney's Fees $4,842.39 and Costs $507.80, for a total of $70,584.30
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Continued To Jan-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
